text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day before the fall Tenno Sho, Air Groove's
mother comes to visit us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Groove's mother is worried about whether her
uptight daughter is enjoying herself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's filled with relief after witnessing the bond
that Air Groove and I have built.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After some brief quality time together, Air
Groove sees her mother off.
